title: Individual Savings Account and Child Trust Funds (Amendment) Regulations 2025
body: "This measure:   allows recognised funds in the Temporary Marketing Permissions Regime (TMPR) to remain as Individual Savings Accounts (ISA) or Child Trust Funds (CTF) qualifying investments on 1 January 2027 considers Long Term Asset Funds (LTAFs) to be included within the qualifying investment types for Innovative Finance ISAs  requires ISA managers to obtain a National Insurance number from all investors who are eligible to have one updates the rules relating to withdrawals of a current year ISA subscription from a flexible account   Elements relating to:   National Insurance numbers will take effect from 6 April 2027 recognised funds, LTAFs and flexible ISAs will take effect from 15 July 2025   "
